ogTitle: Bountiful Islands vs Bowen Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bountiful Islands and Bowen Hills.
heading: Bountiful Islands vs Bowen Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bountiful Islands, Queensland and Bowen Hills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bountiful Islands has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Bowen Hills (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bountiful Islands or Bowen Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bountiful Islands has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Bowen Hills scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bountiful Islands scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Bowen Hills scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bountiful Islands or Bowen Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bountiful Islands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
